recentWork.title: Fixed 4 blockers from Esther's QA review
recentWork.summary: Fixed auth bypass (reject when env vars missing), added rate limiting on telemetry (60 req/min per key), added zod input validation on spans, created Drizzle migration for llm_request/trust_score/score_snapshot tables

recentWork.title: Archive Dormant Repos
recentWork.summary: Archived 3 dormant repos: llmtrust-monorepo, llmtrust-chat, llmtrust-back
